3207430.name: Dragonfly
3207430.description:
Recently headhunted by Coyote Solutions Ltd. as a kinetic security consultant, your new job will involve you stepping into the shoes of a surplus DRAGONFLY MK. 2 bipedal scout armor chassis as you (forcibly) negotiate with various rival corporations, many of whom are the opposite of polite. Faced with these obstinate heavily armed individuals, there is only one standard operating procedure- you'll have to kill them before they kill you.

  • Progress through a number of varied environments, ranging from barren war-torn ruins to opulent futuristic compounds.

  • Each mission gives you multiple avenues of approach to outflank your enemies, and has secret areas and items to reward exploration

  • Environments that are filled with destructible structures and interactive mechanisms that you can exploit to outmatch your enemies.

  • Wield a wide arsenal of hard-hitting weaponry, ranging from heavy revolvers and standard police shotguns to advanced high-tech lasers and anti-tank rifles.

  • Fit out your fighting harness with various upgrades, giving you the ability to smash straight through concrete walls, see behind solid cover, and dodge bullets.

  • Fight clever enemies who'll try to flank and surprise you.

  • Cavort through a neurotic world where your actions (or inaction) affects those around you.

  • And more? And more.
3207430.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
